title: Shopner Ghor
overview: The film revolves around a couple, Maria and Shimanto and their desire of having their dream house. But things soon start to get strange for them since the house is said to be cursed. The owners of the house, Mr. and Mrs. D'Souza adds more to the horror by being worshipers of black magic.
